caption: YOMARTINS STOOL 2026.
__DIMENSIONS:__ W 37 x D 37 x H 45 cm
__WEIGHT:__ 9.0 Kg
overview.text: YOMARTINS is a cork stool that explores the balance between sculptural form and material honesty. Made from Portuguese cork, naturally lightweight, resilient, and tactile. It offers a comfortable seat defined by soft, considered proportions.

caption: DECONSTRUCTION.
deconstruction.text: Composed of three solid cork elements, the piece is assembled without glue or tools. Designed to be transported flat, assembled on site.

caption: SEPARATED
BLOCKS
separated_blocks.text: The structure relies on a carefully designed interlocking system, where form and tension work together to ensure stability.

caption: INTERLOCKING
SYSTEM.
interlocking_system.text: Sustainable by nature and crafted with care, the stool reflects a thoughtful dialogue between local expertise, intelligent construction, and modern design.

material_variations.caption: variations
material_variations.text: Yomartins stool collection are available in a range of distinct variations, each defined by its unique material composition and aesthetic expression. These include light cork, brown cork, and mixed cork variations, offering a spectrum of tones and textures to suit different preferences and interior contexts.

caption: CORK
TREES.
cork_trees.text: Shaped by skilled artisans, the piece embraces imperfection and material honesty, resulting in an object that feels both grounded and expressive. More than a seat, it is a statement — quiet, tactile, and confidently contemporary.

caption: CRAFTSMANSHIP.
craftsmanship.text: YOMARTINS exists at the crossroads of object and sculpture. Its bold, almost architectural form elevates cork beyond function, revealing its texture, warmth, and raw beauty.
